name: Mai Tai
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Creme de noyaux or orgeat
recipeInstructions: Fill a mixing glass with crushed ice. Add rum, creme de noyaux, triple sec, and sour mix. Shake well and strain into a collins glass filled with ice cubes. Top with a dash of Rose's lime juice and a dash of pineapple juice. Garnish with an orange slice and a cherry.
